Adi HosManager

Healthcare Management · Healthcare

Advanced Hospital Management System Software

Technologies

PHPLaravelReactMySQLREST APIHL7 FHIRDICOM

Key Features

  • ✓ Comprehensive patient registration and EMR
  • ✓ Advanced appointment scheduling system
  • ✓ Automated billing and insurance processing
  • ✓ Integrated pharmacy and inventory management
  • ✓ Complete staff and department management
  • ✓ Clinical reports and dashboards
  • ✓ Telemedicine integration
  • ✓ Medical device integration

Project Details

Category
Healthcare Management
Industry
Healthcare
Target Audience
Hospitals, Clinics, Healthcare networks, Medical practices
Pricing Model
Per bed/month + Implementation
Price Range
$50-200/bed/month + $10,000-50,000 implementation
Development Time
10-15 months
Team Size
8-10 developers + Healthcare IT specialists
Market Size
$31.19 billion (2025) → $54.20 billion (2034)

Unique Selling Points

AI-powered diagnostics supportInteroperability focusPatient engagement tools
